properties.Condition: at a crossing on a dam, could probably even fit more than 2 cars, mown
properties.Comment: On the way to the point there is a locked barrier and afterwards an unlocked gate. If we could get the key for the barrier we could get much closer to the point.
Optimism is a must
Gravel
4 motion recommended. mostly gras. option for U-turn

properties.Condition: Border of the way, multiple cars can stand there but be careful not to go to close to the ditch! No turn possible, but it is not a dead end, so no problem!

properties.Comment: High clearance recommended

properties.Condition: Good access only in Schlagbaum is Opened by Ordnungsamt. Phone number in elab

properties.Comment: Dry parking

properties.Condition: On the border of the field, totally fine, at least with four wheel drive.
There is an area with additional concrete fields where you can park.

properties.Comment: Narrow Road to this Point, use only old cars
Narrow Road to here

properties.Condition: Four wheel drive needed, seemed ok at first when we parked there, but was difficult to get out again. Street is also super bumpy, we were glad to have the Amarok that day.
properties.Comment: The hunter seems to park there and there is probably space for a second car.

properties.Condition: Grassland, with four wheel drive ok, at least if it was mown recently and if there wasn't a lot of rain recently.
properties.Comment: Questionable if we are allowed to be there, when grass is high we probaly should walk instead, so that we don't flatten grass for harvest/cause damage.
Drive along the edge of the field towards hunting tower
Easier parking for 124 on the side of the field
Park close to fence, owner does not like parking in the middle of parking space
4wd not needed but recommended

properties.Condition: Ok, grassland area next to the way. Four wheel drive advised! Boots maybe sufficient, better also bring waders. To get to the parking spot with the car: There are two ways. The way to the west, which is also marked here in QField, is less steep than the one to the north, both can be used to get there, but for the way back, the way to the west should be preferred to avoid to drive a very steep hill upwards. The way to the west includes ways over the field that are not visible on google maps/satellite fotos. I tried to add them here, but it is not super accurate, since we did not track it, but added it from memory.

properties.Comment: Actual parking spot, another option with four wheel drive would be going through the field
Solid street, point for turning nearby
Grassland, path is ok to drive, might even work with a bus
Solid road, turning point at parking lot of point 86
maybe SUV needed for turning, might be difficult to turn if overall wetter conditions
Grass, point for turning
Dreikan tschlüssel needed
SUV is good to have, Dreikantschlüssel for Poller needed
a bit muddy, best to have four wheel drive, otherwise park earlier on the road
Side of road
at road
P1
P2

properties.Condition: Mineral way, when grass is high, park at the street or at the way through the creek (alternative parking points are marked)

Mineral area on the grassland, super ok to park there, but be careful when turning the car, the apparent way to the east is not save, we had to be pulled out by the farmer! If gate (marked as alternative parking spot) is closed, either park at the gate (you can easily walk around  the gate) or if you have heavy equipment you can call the Farmer Mr. Grabowski (017640240402) or Kees Vegelin (017678106027) beforehand and ask if he can open the gate for you on that day
properties.Comment: There is a gate (alternative parking spot), if farmer or Kees is not there, walk from there.
Use under wet conditions. Otherwise other parking space 161 may be used
Space for 2 transporter, field

properties.Condition: 4wd needed. ONLY use when dry and moawed

properties.Comment: option for turning around at the southern end of the road

properties.Condition: Unclear - we are allowed to drive in up to this point (only if we have heavy equipment), but we came from the other site on installation day. If you do not have a lot of equipment, please park outside of the Anklamer Stadtbruch!
properties.Comment: we are allowed to drive in up to this point (only if we have heavy equipment), but we came from the other site on installation day. If you do not have a lot of equipment, please park outside of the Anklamer Stadtbruch!
Park here if you do not have a lot of equipment, driving into the Anklamer Stadtbruch is only allowed if we have a lot of equipment to carry!
Alternative parking point for FID 121 when grass is high, so that we should not drive on the field so that fodder is not damaged too much.

Alternative parking point for FID 121, when grass is high, so that we should not drive onto the field so that fodder is not damaged. There is a way through a creek (you can also cross the creek with the car when the water is not super high)

Park here if the gate is closed, you can easily walk around the gate.  If you have heavy equipment you can call the Farmer Mr. Grabowski (017640240402) or Kees Vegelin (017678106027) beforehand and ask if he can open the gate for you on that day

properties.Condition: Good, park here for point 37 (and 35) when you don't have much equipment.
properties.Comment: park here for point 37 (and 35) when you don't have much equipment.
far away from plot

Forest ground but solid, when driving from Gruel on the forest road, just past the intersection with the other small path, on the right side of the road there is some space  for a car. Other path at the intersection not usable. Best to approach from Gruel
Gate locked, call Kees Vegelin to open

properties.Condition: Dry, parking for at least 2 cars
Very good, birding Tower and Picknick area

properties.Comment: Easy and safe to drive on concrete road
Easy to access along concrete road

properties.Condition: Hotel parking lot, if you park here, better ask, if it is ok to be there, usually they will say it's fine.
properties.Comment: Other Parking spot is closer to the area, but was not reachable because of road closure on installation day.

properties.Condition: Might work as alternative option for the hotel parking lot
properties.Comment: Driving further in is possible (road is ok), but is not allowed as far as we know.
2 electric cattle fences at beginning of way. Can be opened easily

properties.Condition: Okay to drive in conditions that day, road quite narrow

properties.Comment: Driving and parking on farmland possible
Gate
far away from plot for plot 7, very ok for plot 162

properties.Condition: Good, but private property! We are allowed to park on the grass under the trees. Put paper with number and that you belong to the University of Rostock or Greifswald ( if not written on the car) in the car window. Owner does not talk much, just wave friendly if he is there and it should be fine. Do not park further south at the way towards the solar panels.
grassland with firm soil and a visible way driven in by the farmer or hunter
properties.Comment: after that point the grassland was a bit bumpier, therefore better not drive further in

properties.Condition: parking on the way is probably fine, farmer was there and was ok with it, four wheel drive advised! Boots maybe sufficient, better also bring waders.
properties.Comment: No key for the gate, but we can climb over it or the fence, not far to walk and way is firm

properties.Condition: Ok, grassland area next to the way, way to the west is less steep than to the north, both can be used to get there, four wheel drive advised! Boots maybe sufficient, better also bring waders.
properties.Comment: Site not set up yet but visited with Kees, will be set up when protection against water buffalos is clarified; maybe put the plot a bit more north so that it is easier to get away from the water buffalos if necessary

properties.Condition: Good, park here for point 37 (and 35) when you don't have much equipment.
properties.Comment: park here for point 37 (and 35) when you don't have much equipment.
One optional parking space, road might be to wet
Saver parkimg space for site 149, but farther away. Choose wisely
Park at themeadow stripe aalong the road.careful traffic
